calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-08-2004 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Plaintiff: Dorothy Kennedy and Defendant: Rosemary Perkins, are present in pro per.
11:10 a.m. Parties present in court with JPT. George Wailes, presided over the settlement conference this morning, reached a settlement, terms read into the record by Mr. Wailes as follows:
Parties stipulated to a reduced Judgment in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant for the total amount of 1,400.00, payment of $625.00 to plaintiff's mail-slot on or before Nov. 8, 2004, and the balance of $775.00 by Nov. 10, 2004.
By Dec. 31, 2004, Defendant to vacate the property located at 5174 3rd Street #3, San Francisco under bloom clean condition, and to return all keys in exchange for a return of a $25.00 security deposit.
If Defendant fail to vacate, Plaintiff will be entitled to entry of Judgment against Defendant upon Ex Parte application to the Court.
Each party waives claim against the other.
Plaintiff will only give reference as to date of move in and out.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DOROTHY KENNEDY IN PRO PER
DEFENDANT ROSEMARY PERKINS IN PRO PER

THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE THIS DAY. BOTH PARTIES WERE PRESENT AS INDICATED ABOVE. SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS WERE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JPT AVNER SOFER; CLERK CLARK BANAYAD; NOT REPORTED. (218)
